@pytest.mark.unit
    def test_add_movement():
        with get_session() as session:
            data = {
                "role": "Salesman",
                "dept": "Sales",
                "name": "Joe Doe",
                "email": "joe@doe.com",
            }
            joe, created = add_person(session, Person(**data))
            assert created is True
    
            data = {
                "role": "Manager",
                "dept": "Management",
                "name": "Jim Doe",
                "email": "jim@doe.com",
            }
            jim, created = add_person(session, Person(**data))
            assert created is True
    
            session.commit()
